# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the pending drain-loop remediations. Bead mutations now have explicit prepare/persist hooks so landed, skipped, and follow-up bead changes are synced, committed, and pushed to master before the next cycle can hard-reset. The concrete run adapter now reads the final run snapshot after start/resume and maps non-completed states into classifier-friendly failure observations instead of treating every Ok(()) as completion. Interrupt handling now checks at loop entry and between long steps, makes PR watch sleeps interrupt-aware, races run start/resume against Ctrl-C, and stops before recovery handling when an interrupt is observed.","outstanding_risks":["br lint could not be run because br is not available in this environment, including inside nix develop.","The existing .ralph-burning/projects/vl8z-1 orchestration state remains modified and outside review scope."],"steps":[{"description":"Added drain port hooks for preparing a clean bead mutation base and pers
